description:
**Milestone:** Knowledge Store Foundation

Implement chunk parsing and ingestion in KnowledgeStoreService. Add MemoryChunker utility to libs/utils/src/memory-chunker.ts that: (1) parses .md files, splits into chunks on ## headings (each chunk = heading + content up to 500 tokens, preserving frontmatter tags and importance for the first chunk only), (2) falls back to paragraph-based splitting for files with no ## headings. Add ingestMemoryFiles(projectPath) that reads all .md files from .automaker/memory/, calls MemoryChunker, upserts chunks into SQLite (by source_file+chunk_index). Add ingestContextFiles(projectPath) for .automaker/context/. Add ingestReflections(projectPath) that walks all .automaker/features/{id}/reflection.md files. Add rebuildIndex(projectPath) that clears and re-ingests all sources. Add a file watcher in the service that calls rebuildIndex debounced 2s after any .automaker/memory/*.md write. Export MemoryChunker from @automaker/utils.

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/utils/src/memory-chunker.ts
- libs/utils/src/index.ts
- apps/server/src/services/knowledge-store-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] MemoryChunker splits architecture.md (375KB) into correct header-based chunks
- [ ] ingestMemoryFiles() populates SQLite with chunks from all .automaker/memory/*.md files
- [ ] ingestContextFiles() ingests .automaker/context/*.md files
- [ ] ingestReflections() ingests all feature reflection.md files
- [ ] Chunk upsert uses INSERT OR REPLACE on (source_file, chunk_index) key
- [ ] File watcher triggers rebuildIndex debounced after memory writes
- [ ] npm run build:packages && npm run build:server passes

**Complexity:** medium
title: Chunk Ingestion Pipeline
